evals.prompt: Run the serialized_dag tests. The file is marked with @pytest.mark.db_test.
evals.expected_output: Uses uv run --project airflow-core pytest ... -xvs (not breeze run pytest)

assertions.name: uses_uv_not_breeze
assertions.criterion: The command uses 'uv run --project' to run the test, not 'breeze run pytest'

evals.prompt: I just tweaked the scheduler Helm template. Run chart/tests/test_scheduler.py.
evals.expected_output: Uses breeze testing helm-tests (not uv run pytest)

assertions.name: uses_breeze_helm
assertions.criterion: The command uses 'breeze testing helm-tests' to run Helm tests

assertions.name: does_not_use_uv
assertions.criterion: The command does NOT use 'uv run' or 'uv run pytest' for Helm tests

evals.prompt: I want to validate my DAG serialization change locally, nothing fancy. The test file is marked with @pytest.mark.backend("postgres"); just run it quickly.
evals.expected_output: Uses breeze run pytest ... --backend postgres (not uv run pytest)

assertions.name: uses_breeze_with_backend
assertions.criterion: The command uses 'breeze' to run the test (not 'uv run')

assertions.name: does_not_use_uv
assertions.criterion: The command does NOT use 'uv run --project' for a postgres-backend test
